name: synthesized-fub-burst-3-webhooks
description: Synthesized version of the 2026-05-12 lead-20235 incident pattern: three peopleUpdated webhooks for the same lead within ~8 seconds with no engine cause. Today's engine plans one workflow run per webhook, producing three parallel runs on the same lead. This fixture is for harness fidelity validation. Real DB-extracted fixtures (lead 20235, 20231, 20207, 20123) will replace and supplement this once payloads are exported.

expected.notes: Documents BAD behavior under current engine: three parallel runs for one logical edit pattern. After Phase 2 (diff collapse) this should drop to one run; after Phase 5 (run dedup) it is hard-capped at one. Update expectations as those phases land.
